docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,309.40 FILED BY G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, BENJAMIN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, BENJAMIN D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF G.E. CAPITAL CORP./MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, BENJAMIN D. $1,309.40 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,366.40, $313 WILL BE PAID BY THE DEFT ON 8/23/94. BALANCE STATED BELOW STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
